overall.description: Gameplay footage from GTA V showing a character walking through Los Santos International Airport at night. The character moves from a ground-level covered terminal walkway past 'San Fierro Air' signage, ascends a dark stairwell, and emerges onto an upper-level walkway with views of parking structures and the city skyline.

scene_state.functional_zone: airport terminal ground level covered walkway

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the covered terminal walkway beneath blue overhead lights

notable_agents.action: pedestrian walking in the opposite direction along the walkway

entered.detail: airport terminal building with illuminated 'San Fierro Air' signage and glass facade
overhead concrete roof structure with linear fluorescent lighting
multi-lane road with taxi stand markings visible on the asphalt
elevated walkway structure connecting terminal buildings across the road
circular blue illuminated signs hanging from the terminal ceiling

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a covered airport terminal walkway at night, passing beneath blue hanging lights. The 'San Fierro Air' terminal building is visible on the right with its glass facade illuminated, while the airport road runs parallel on the left. Sparse pedestrians walk in opposing directions, and the overhead pedestrian bridge is visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: enclosed concrete stairwell connecting terminal levels

events.description: enters dark enclosed stairwell from the covered terminal walkway
red handrails become visible as the character ascends toward the exit light

agents.ego_description: climbing the concrete stairs in the dimly lit stairwell toward the upper level

entered.detail: dark doorway leading into the enclosed stairwell structure
steep concrete staircase with dark walls on both sides
red metal handrails mounted on the white walls of the stairwell

segments.scene_description: The character enters a dark, enclosed concrete stairwell, leaving the terminal walkway behind. Ascending the steep stairs with red metal handrails, the environment becomes dimly lit with only emergency lighting visible until approaching the exit at the top.

scene_state.functional_zone: airport terminal upper level walkway overlooking parking structures

events.description: exits stairwell onto upper level terminal walkway with view of parking garage
turns left to follow the walkway along the terminal facade
vehicles pass by on the airport road visible below the walkway

agents.ego_description: walking along the elevated terminal walkway following an NPC ahead, overlooking the airport road and parking structures

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in dark clothing walking ahead along the walkway

entered.detail: airport terminal section with illuminated 'Air Emu' signage and green lettering
large concrete parking structure with multiple levels visible across the road
tall illuminated advertisement screen displaying colorful content
terminal section with 'MyFly' signage visible further down the walkway

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the stairwell onto an upper-level walkway, the character encounters the 'Air Emu' terminal section. The walkway offers an elevated view of the multi-story parking garage and digital billboards across the road. The character follows an NPC pedestrian along the covered walkway, passing from 'Air Emu' toward the 'MyFly' terminal section while vehicles pass below on the airport road.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a brightly lit airport terminal walkway into a dark stairwell before emerging onto an elevated observation level. It begins by walking along a covered path at night, passing beneath blue hanging lights and the illuminated glass facade of the San Fierro Air terminal. As the character leaves the terminal walkway, the scene shifts abruptly into a dimly lit, enclosed concrete stairwell where the camera ascends steep stairs guided by red metal handrails and sparse emergency lighting. The environment then opens up as the camera emerges from the stairwell onto an upper-level walkway, transitioning from the darkness into the Air Emu terminal section. Finally, the view expands to reveal a multi-story parking garage and digital billboards across the road while the camera follows a pedestrian toward the MyFly terminal.
